title: Create: Craft and Conquer SMP
description: Create: Craft and Conquer SMP centers on the Create Mod with carefully chosen Create addons that deepen automation, engineering, trains, and factory systems.
body:
A Create focused modpack for Minecraft 1.20.1 [Forge] put together by The_Gamer6000 and used in our Create: Craft and Conquer SMP.

This time much more heavily focussed on the core of Create 6.0+ with a handful of essential mods and some nice to haves.

Build automated factories, rail networks and explore a range of decorative blocks and utilites to enhance your Minecraft world. Including Chipped, Sophisticated Backpacks as well as a few supplemetary and decorative mods.

Great for players looking for a more fully featured world environment with quality of life and performance improvements a plenty!

**Create 6.0 + Add-ons:**  
Create Big Cannons  
Create Contraption Terminals  
Create Jetpack  
Create Ore Excavation  
Create: Connected  
Create: Copycats+  
Create: Enchantment Industry  
Create: Liquid Fuel  
Create: New Age  
Create: Pattern Schematics  
Create: Power Loader  
Create: Structures  
Create: Steam 'n' Rails  
Create: The Factory Must Grow  
Create: Vintage  
Create: Connected  
Create: Copycats+  
Create: Packagers PSI Compat
